chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 290 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 23.11.2022 Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Safdar Ali Kalwar (Mukhiarkar, Taluka Kingri)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks, inter alia, directions to respondents No.2 to 7 to remove illegal occupancy over the graveyard of his elders situated at Dargah Shaheed Badshah near Sadar Joon Bhattion, Taluka Kingri, District Khairpur. Learned A.A.G., Sindh has filed comments of respondent No.4 (Mukhtiarkar, Taluka Kingri), which reflects that he visited the site along with villagers and S.H.O., Police Station Abdul Rehman Unar, in order to ascertain the facts of the matter. He has further stated that the private respondent neither demolished any grave nor constructed any new building, but he is residing in an old house of his father since long. The petition, being based on misconceived facts, is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
